name: Public Storage
description: Public Storage is the leading provider of self-storage units for personal, business, and vehicle needs, operating thousands of facilities across the United States. As a real estate investment trust (REIT), the company focuses on the acquisition, development, ownership, and operation of self-storage properties. Public Storage offers a wide variety of unit sizes and amenities, including climate-controlled spaces and drive-up access, with no long-term commitments. Known for its iconic orange door branding, the company has been a trusted name in the storage industry since its founding in 1972.
